steps.title: Trace the passage structure
steps.content: The text first explains dopamine-based signaling in mammals, then introduces Park's observation that honeybee behaviors are also motivated by a dopamine-based signaling process.

steps.title: Emphasize shared mechanisms
steps.content: The main purpose is to summarize a finding that some insect brain mechanisms resemble mammalian brain mechanisms. A invents a human experimental method, B claims insects express feelings, and D focuses on behavior similarity rather than the physiological mechanism. The answer is C.
